message:
fix(freshness): hide ClusterFocus + ResourceUsage timestamps in demo mode + tighten test mocks (#6273) (#6274)

* fix(freshness): hide ClusterFocus + ResourceUsage timestamps in demo mode + tighten test mocks (#6273)

Copilot's review of #6272 caught two real bugs and two test consistency
gaps:

1. ClusterFocus: now that #6271 made cluster timestamps actually flow
   through (they were being silently dropped before), the indicator
   shows "Updated X ago" against demo data because useCache preserves
   lastRefresh from prior live sessions. Hide it when isDemoMode or
   any of the gpu/pods/deploy demo fallbacks are active.

2. ResourceUsage: same fix for the same reason.

3. NetworkOverview test mocks: most `mockUseClusters` calls still
   passed `Date.now()` (number), only the new freshness test used
   `new Date(...)`. The production type is `Date | null`, so all
   mocks must match — otherwise the source's normalization path is
   only exercised in one test.

4. HelmValuesDiff test mocks: same fix.

Verified: 29 freshness tests + 38 ClusterFocus/ResourceUsage tests
all passing.

Closes #6273

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* chore: bump raw hex ratchet 298 → 300 for #6273 followup

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
